response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack development with experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning with the primary stack. They also have a diverse skill set and experience with various technologies and programming languages.
strengths: Proven ability to work on complex projects
concerns: Some skills mentioned in the job description (e.g., Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin/Java for backend services) are not explicitly listed in the resume
Less experience with specific cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) compared to other candidates
No direct mention of AI agent development experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit experience with specific technologies (Nest.js, Vitest)
